name: AdminHelper
description: Adds direct staff moderation commands for ban, hackban, unban, kick, softban, timeout, untimeout, warn, warning lookup, warning clearing, purge, user info, moderation cases, mod stats, and configurable manual-warning punishments, with optional DM notices and mod-log embeds.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: AdminHelper loaded. Use `[p]adminhelper` to inspect settings. Moderation commands include `[p]ban`, `[p]kick`, `[p]timeout`, `[p]softban`, and `[p]purge`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild-level moderation settings, configurable manual-warning punishments containing thresholds, actions, role IDs where applicable, creator IDs, reasons, and timestamps, plus case records containing action types, target IDs/names, moderator IDs/names, reasons, timestamps, durations, and details. It also stores per-member warning records containing moderator IDs, reasons, timestamps, and case IDs, per-user previous username/global display name history observed while the cog is loaded, and per-member previous server nickname history observed while the cog is loaded.
